backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores health records in a map, exposes addRecord and getAllRecords/getRecordById query methods, and calculates a weighted risk score (0–100) with low/moderate/high classification.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the task of fixing all TypeScript compilation errors in the frontend build pipeline, listing the affected files and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key dependencies on backend types.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with four routes (/, /xray, /dashboard, /history), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, and renders a sidebar layout with header and footer.
frontend/src/components/AppSidebar.tsx: Sidebar navigation component with logo, four nav links using TanStack Router's Link, active state highlighting, and a medical disclaimer notice in the footer.
frontend/src/components/RiskGauge.tsx: Canvas-based semicircular gauge that draws color-coded arc segments, a needle, and a score label based on a numeric risk score and RiskLevel enum from the backend interface.
Horizontal progress-bar chart component that displays Normal and Pneumonia probability percentages with green and red color coding.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance, using the current Internet Identity and invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads using DFINITY's AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching all health records and adding a new record via the backend actor, with cache invalidation on mutation success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines CSS custom properties for a clinical navy/teal color palette including light/dark modes and risk-level utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/riskCalculator.ts: Pure function that computes a 0–100 cardiovascular risk score from patient vitals and classifies it as low, moderate, or high risk based on defined thresholds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying aggregate stats (total, high-risk, moderate-risk, average score) and a sortable table of all health records with CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/pages/History.tsx: History page that lists all past health risk assessments sorted by most recent, showing patient demographics, vitals, risk badge, and timestamp for each record.
frontend/src/pages/RiskPredictor.tsx: Risk Predictor page with a form for entering patient vitals that computes a live risk score via riskCalculator and allows saving the result to the backend.
frontend/src/pages/XRayAnalysis.tsx: React page for chest X-ray upload and simulated pneumonia classification, displaying a preview image, confidence score, and bar chart results with a medical disclaimer.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility function that converts an array of HealthRecord objects into a CSV file and triggers a browser download.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom color palettes (navy, teal, health risk colors), fonts, border radii, shadows, and animation keyframes for the frontend.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the AI Preventive Healthcare platform's features, architecture, known build/deployment issues, and versioned feature list for planning purposes.
